name: Sherlock — Naturalistic Movie Watching & Recall (ds001132)
description: An OpenNeuro dataset (ds001132) in which 16 participants watched the first ~50 minutes of BBC's 'Sherlock' during fMRI, then verbally recalled the episode while being scanned. The shared narrative and rich social content (intentions, deception, social inference) make it a benchmark for naturalistic memory, event segmentation, and shared social experience.
citation: Chen J, Leong YC, Honey CJ, Yong CH, Norman KA, Hasson U (2017). Shared memories reveal shared structure in neural activity across individuals. Nature Neuroscience, 20, 115–125.

publications.title: A functional neuroimaging dataset acquired during naturalistic movie watching and narrated recall of short cinematic films
